The '''''Master Stroke''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

The ''Master Stroke'' remained in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service until at least [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], when it participated in the [[Battle of Adumar]] after the planet joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In that battle, the ''Master Stroke'' suffered serious damage at the hands of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']] and [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Mon Casima]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
